summary: Patchwork, incomplete recording with questionable source integrity and no musical highlights noted
review: The reviewer condemns this release as a mishmash of partial Set 1 tracks duplicated and spliced together from other shows, describing the lineage as unknown. No praise is given for performance or sound quality; the posting is deemed a wasted effort.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, rating 0 stars, highlights major source and editing problems with no positive comments.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Patchwork of multiple sources, incomplete Set 1 duplicated, unclear lineage; likely low fidelity and inconsistent mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer notes the setlist is incomplete and contains duplicate partial Set 1 material, indicating a disjointed presentation.
